title.en: What is going on! 도대체 이게 무슨 일이야!

description.en: Learn expressions for when something completely unexpected or absurd happens. Master reactions like "What on earth!"
description.ko: 정말 황당하고 믿기지 않는 일을 겪었을 때 쓰는 표현들을 배워봅니다. "도대체"와 "이게 뭐야"의 리액션을 마스터해봐요!

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up guys. Welcome back to Talkori. I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 안녕하세요 여러분! 벌써 4화네요! 미나입니다.
content.translation: Hello everyone! It's already episode four! I'm Mina.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. Wait a second..., look at my coffee mug! Why is there a raw potato inside my mug?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 어? "이게 뭐야~!"
content.translation: Huh? What is this~!

insight.title: 이게 뭐야
insight.usage_tip: Used when you are surprised or annoyed by a strange object or situation.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 도대체..., 이게 대체 무슨 일이야!
content.translation: What on earth is going on!

insight.title: 도대체
insight.usage_tip: Used to add strong emphasis to a question when you are frustrated or confused.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Someone must have played a prank on me. I was so confused.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와~ 진짜 황당하네요! 오늘은 바로 이런 상황에서 쓰는 리액션들을 배워볼게요!
content.translation: Wow~ that's so absurd! Today. We'll learn reactions for exactly these kinds of situations!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay Mina. In English. We say "What on earth!" or "What's going on!"

content.speaker: John
content.text: But in Korean. I hear the word "Dae-che" or "Do-dae-che" a lot.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. "도대체"는 강조할 때 쓰는 마법 같은 단어예요.
content.translation: That's right. 'Do-dae-che' is like a magic word for emphasis.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 도대체..., 이게 무슨 일이야!
content.translation: What on earth is happening!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아주 자연스러워요! 그리고 더 짧게 말하고 싶을 땐. "이게 대체 뭐야~!" 라고 하면 돼요.
content.translation: Very natural! And if you want it shorter. Say 'I-ge dae-che mwo-ya~!'.

insight.title: 이게 대체 뭐야
insight.usage_tip: A more emphatic version of '이게 뭐야'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: So "Dae-che" and "Do-dae-che" are pretty much the same.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 거의 비슷해요. "도대체"가 조금 더 강조하는 느낌..., 이랄까요?
content.translation: Yes. They are similar. 'Do-dae-che' feels a bit more emphasized..., I guess?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Got it. And what about when something is just... a total mess.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐 인상을 살짝 쓰면서. "이게 뭐야~!" 라고 하세요.
content.translation: In that case. Frown a little and say. 'I-ge mwo-ya~!'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's practice. Imagine we just walked into our office. And it's filled with balloons. Thousands of them!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 어?
content.translation: Huh?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이게 다 뭐야~?
content.translation: What are all these~?

content.speaker: John
content.text: What on earth! I can't even see my desk!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 도대체..., "이게 대체 무슨 일이야!"
content.translation: What on earth is going on!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Is it someone's birthday. Or is this another prank.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 글쎄요..., "도대체" 누가 이런 걸까요?
content.translation: I don't know..., who on earth would do this?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Look! There's a giant cake under your chair!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 진짜요? 와~ "이게 뭐야~!" 진짜 대박이다!
content.translation: Really? Wow~ what is this~! This is totally awesome!

content.speaker: John
content.text: These reactions really make the conversation more alive.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 놀랐을 때는 숨기지 말고 오늘 배운 표현들을 써보세요!
content.translation: Right. When you are surprised. Don't hide it. Use the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review the five reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number one. "이게 뭐야~!"
content.translation: What is this~!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number two. "이게 대체 뭐야!"
content.translation: What on earth is this!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number three. "도대체..., 이게 무슨 일이야!"
content.translation: What on earth is going on!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number four. "이게 대체 무슨 일이야!"
content.translation: What is going on!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number five. "도대체"
content.translation: On earth / In the world

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 황당한 일을 겪으면 꼭 외쳐보세요! "도대체!"
content.translation: Everyone. If something absurd happens. Make sure to shout! 'Do-dae-che!'

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. We'll see you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 도대체 왜 그랬어요? (Why on earth did you do that?)
이게 무슨 일이에요? (What is going on?)
우와. 이게 뭐야? (Wow. What is this?)

vocabulary.meaning: To be absurd. To be ridiculous
vocabulary.example: 정말 황당한 상황이네요. (This is a truly absurd situation.)
이게 대체 얼마예요? (How much on earth is this?)
도대체 누가 그랬어? (Who on earth did that?)
